subcodes.first_line: The mention of God hath arisen from the Sacred Tree in that spot which God hath blessed above all the regions of earth - there is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله فی شجره القدس بقعه التی بارکها الله علی بقاع الارض الله لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @idolatry, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
